title: Soul outlined netherite
description: This adds a soul collor outline to netherite.
body:
# Soul Outlined Netherite
Bring a mystical twist to your Netherite gear! This resource pack adds a striking soul-blue outline to all Netherite items, including:

- Netherite Ingot
- Netherite Sword
- Netherite Axe
- Netherite Shovel
- Netherite Hoe
- Netherite Pickaxe

### Why download it?

- Unique Aesthetic: Stand out with a vibrant soul-blue accent that makes your Netherite tools look powerful and otherworldly.
- Immersive Theme: Perfect for players who love a magical or ethereal vibe in their Minecraft world.
- Lightweight & Compatible: Simple, clean design that works seamlessly with most packs and shaders.

Give your Netherite gear a soul-infused glow and make your adventures feel legendary!

## Terms of Use

You are free to use this resource pack in Minecraft, your videos, and your modpacks.

If you include it in a modpack or showcase it in a video, I would appreciate it if you add a link to this page in the description.

_**Do not redistribute or claim the pack as your own.**_
